moduleTitle: 后厨备菜、炸炉、洗碗和清洁
english: We need one more combo for table two.
chinese: 二号桌还需要一份套餐。
scenario: 前台或同事通知厨房，某桌还需要再做一份套餐。
importance: 后厨工作靠短指令推进，听懂流程能更快上手。
variants: We need one more combo for table two.

dialogue.english: We need one more combo for table two.
dialogue.chinese: 二号桌还需要一份套餐。

vocabularyNotes.note: 这句话里的工作关键词。
vocabularyNotes.example: We need one more combo for table two.

moduleTitle: 后厨备菜、炸炉、洗碗和清洁
english: No sauce on this order.
scenario: 前台把顾客的特殊要求传达给厨房，明确这份订单不加酱。
importance: 后厨工作靠短指令推进，听懂流程能更快上手。
variants: No sauce on this order.

vocabularyNotes.note: 这句话里的工作关键词。

moduleTitle: 后厨备菜、炸炉、洗碗和清洁
english: Make this one with light sauce.
scenario: 顾客要求少酱时，前台或同事向制作人员传达。
importance: 后厨工作靠短指令推进，听懂流程能更快上手。
variants: Make this one with light sauce.

dialogue.english: Make this one with light sauce.

vocabularyNotes.note: 这句话里的工作关键词。
vocabularyNotes.example: Make this one with light sauce.

moduleTitle: 后厨备菜、炸炉、洗碗和清洁
english: The customer wants the sauce on the side.
scenario: 顾客要求酱料单独装时，前台向厨房或打包人员说明。
importance: 后厨工作靠短指令推进，听懂流程能更快上手。
variants: The customer wants the sauce on the side.

dialogue.english: The customer wants the sauce on the side.

vocabularyNotes.note: 酱料不拌进去，单独放。

moduleTitle: 后厨备菜、炸炉、洗碗和清洁
english: How long on the tenders?
scenario: 前台或出餐人员向厨房询问鸡柳还需要多久。
importance: 后厨工作靠短指令推进，听懂流程能更快上手。
variants: How long on the tenders, please?

vocabularyNotes.note: 这句话里的工作关键词。

moduleTitle: 后厨备菜、炸炉、洗碗和清洁
english: Two more minutes on the fries.
scenario: 厨房员工向前台或同事报告薯条剩余制作时间。
importance: 后厨工作靠短指令推进，听懂流程能更快上手。
variants: Two more minutes on the fries.

dialogue.english: Two more minutes on the fries.

vocabularyNotes.note: 这句话里的工作关键词。
vocabularyNotes.example: Two more minutes on the fries.

moduleTitle: 后厨备菜、炸炉、洗碗和清洁
scenarioTitle: 备菜、洗碗、三槽水池、炸炉、拖地、关店清洁。
english: Please remake this sandwich.
scenario: 发现餐品做错、质量不合格或顾客要求重做时，主管要求重新制作。
importance: 后厨工作靠短指令推进，听懂流程能更快上手。
variants: Can you remake this sandwich?
Could you please remake this sandwich?

vocabularyNotes.note: 这句话里的工作关键词。

moduleTitle: 后厨备菜、炸炉、洗碗和清洁
english: This order is for dine-in.
scenario: 前台向厨房或出餐人员说明订单应使用托盘或堂食包装。
importance: 后厨工作靠短指令推进，听懂流程能更快上手。
variants: This one order is for dine-in.
This item order is for dine-in.

vocabularyNotes.note: 这句话里的工作关键词。

moduleTitle: 后厨备菜、炸炉、洗碗和清洁
english: This order is to go.
scenario: 前台说明订单需要外带包装。
importance: 后厨工作靠短指令推进，听懂流程能更快上手。
variants: This one order is to go.
This item order is to go.

vocabularyNotes.note: 带走吃。

moduleTitle: 后厨备菜、炸炉、洗碗和清洁
english: We're waiting on the wings.
scenario: 出餐人员说明整份订单只差鸡翅尚未完成。
importance: 后厨工作靠短指令推进，听懂流程能更快上手。
variants: We're waiting on the wings.

vocabularyNotes.note: 这句话里的工作关键词。

moduleTitle: 后厨备菜、炸炉、洗碗和清洁
english: Double-check the bag before you seal it.
scenario: 扫地、倒垃圾、换垃圾袋和纸箱回收。
importance: 后厨工作节奏快，听懂这些短句可以避免出餐延误、清洁错误和安全问题。
variants: Check the bag again before sealing it.
Look in the bag one more time before you close it.
recommendedResponses: I’ll make sure everything is inside.
Should I staple the receipt on it?

dialogue.english: Double-check the bag before you seal it.
Okay, I’ll make sure everything is inside.
dialogue.chinese: 好的，我确认所有东西都在里面。

vocabularyNotes.note: 出餐或打包前再确认一次，避免少放东西。

moduleTitle: 后厨备菜、炸炉、洗碗和清洁
english: Put the sauce in a separate cup.
chinese: 把酱装在单独的小杯里。
scenario: 顾客要求酱料放旁边时，使用独立酱杯打包。
importance: 后厨工作靠短指令推进，听懂流程能更快上手。
variants: Put the sauce in a separate cup.

dialogue.english: Put the sauce in a separate cup.
dialogue.chinese: 把酱装在单独的小杯里。

vocabularyNotes.note: 这句话里的工作关键词。
vocabularyNotes.example: Put the sauce in a separate cup.

moduleTitle: 后厨备菜、炸炉、洗碗和清洁
english: Cut the chicken into even pieces.
chinese: 把鸡肉切成大小均匀的块。
scenario: 备菜、切配、称重、份量和食材标签。
importance: 后厨工作节奏快，听懂这些短句可以避免出餐延误、清洁错误和安全问题。
variants: Cut the chicken into the same size pieces.
Make the chicken pieces even.
recommendedResponses: Can you show me the right size?

dialogue.english: Cut the chicken into even pieces.
dialogue.chinese: 把鸡肉切成大小均匀的块。

dialogue.english: Okay. Can you show me the right size?
dialogue.chinese: 好的。你可以给我看正确大小吗？

vocabularyNotes.note: 备菜时每块大小接近，方便熟得一致。

moduleTitle: 后厨备菜、炸炉、洗碗和清洁
english: Make sure the drink goes with the order.
chinese: 确认饮料要和订单一起交付。
scenario: 出餐前确认饮料没有遗漏，尤其是饮料与热食分开放置时。
importance: 后厨工作靠短指令推进，听懂流程能更快上手。
variants: Make sure the drink goes with the order.

dialogue.english: Make sure the drink goes with the order.
dialogue.chinese: 确认饮料要和订单一起交付。

vocabularyNotes.note: 表示确认事情真的做好。

moduleTitle: 后厨备菜、炸炉、洗碗和清洁
english: Don't forget the napkins.
scenario: 打包外带或外卖订单时提醒员工放入餐巾纸。
importance: 后厨工作靠短指令推进，听懂流程能更快上手。
variants: Please don't forget the napkins.

vocabularyNotes.note: 这句话里的工作关键词。

moduleTitle: 后厨备菜、炸炉、洗碗和清洁
english: This bag is for pickup.
scenario: 区分顾客自取与外卖平台订单，避免交错。
importance: 后厨工作靠短指令推进，听懂流程能更快上手。
variants: This one bag is for pickup.
This item bag is for pickup.

vocabularyNotes.note: 这句话里的工作关键词。

moduleTitle: 后厨备菜、炸炉、洗碗和清洁
english: This bag is for delivery.
scenario: 区分外卖配送订单，并放入指定取餐区域。
importance: 后厨工作靠短指令推进，听懂流程能更快上手。
variants: This one bag is for delivery.
This item bag is for delivery.

vocabularyNotes.note: 这句话里的工作关键词。

moduleTitle: 后厨备菜、炸炉、洗碗和清洁
scenarioTitle: 备菜、洗碗、三槽水池、炸炉、拖地、关店清洁。
english: Keep hot food and cold drinks separate.
scenario: 打包时避免冷饮被热食加热或造成包装受潮。
importance: 后厨工作靠短指令推进，听懂流程能更快上手。
variants: Keep hot food and cold drinks separate.

dialogue.english: Keep hot food and cold drinks separate.

vocabularyNotes.note: 这句话里的工作关键词。
vocabularyNotes.example: Keep hot food and cold drinks separate.

moduleTitle: 后厨备菜、炸炉、洗碗和清洁
english: Call the customer's name when the order is ready.
scenario: 堂食或自取订单完成后，通知顾客前来领取。
importance: 后厨工作靠短指令推进，听懂流程能更快上手。
variants: Call the customer's name when the order is ready.

dialogue.english: Call the customer's name when the order is ready.

vocabularyNotes.note: 这句话里的工作关键词。
vocabularyNotes.example: Call the customer's name when the order is ready.

moduleTitle: 后厨备菜、炸炉、洗碗和清洁
english: Check the order number before handing it out.
chinese: 把餐交出去前先核对订单号。
scenario: 交付订单前核对编号，避免把餐交给错误顾客或司机。
importance: 后厨工作靠短指令推进，听懂流程能更快上手。
variants: Check the order number before handing it out.

dialogue.english: Check the order number before handing it out.
dialogue.chinese: 把餐交出去前先核对订单号。

vocabularyNotes.note: 这句话里的工作关键词。
vocabularyNotes.example: Check the order number before handing it out.

moduleTitle: 后厨备菜、炸炉、洗碗和清洁
english: Wipe down the front counter.
scenario: 没有订单或交班前清洁前台接触面。
importance: 后厨工作靠短指令推进，听懂流程能更快上手。
variants: Wipe down the front counter.

vocabularyNotes.note: 这句话里的工作关键词。

moduleTitle: 后厨备菜、炸炉、洗碗和清洁
english: Sweep under the fryer.
scenario: 扫地、倒垃圾、换垃圾袋和纸箱回收。
importance: 后厨工作节奏快，听懂这些短句可以避免出餐延误、清洁错误和安全问题。
variants: Sweep the floor under the fryer.
Clean under the fryer with the broom.
recommendedResponses: Should I move the mats first?
I’ll put the wet floor sign out if needed.

dialogue.english: Okay, I’ll move the mat and sweep under it.
dialogue.chinese: 好的，我会移开地垫并扫下面。

vocabularyNotes.note: 清洁炸炉下方容易积油和食物残渣的区域。

moduleTitle: 后厨备菜、炸炉、洗碗和清洁
english: Take out the trash before closing.
scenario: 扫地、倒垃圾、换垃圾袋和纸箱回收。
importance: 后厨工作节奏快，听懂这些短句可以避免出餐延误、清洁错误和安全问题。
variants: Empty the trash before we close.
Take the garbage out before closing.
recommendedResponses: Okay, I’ll take it out now.
Should I replace the liner too?

dialogue.english: Take out the trash before closing.
Okay, I’ll tie the bag and replace the liner.
dialogue.chinese: 好的，我会扎紧垃圾袋并换新的内衬。

dialogue.english: Thank you. Break down the boxes after that.

vocabularyNotes.note: 把垃圾袋拿到外面的垃圾区或垃圾箱。

moduleTitle: 后厨备菜、炸炉、洗碗和清洁
english: Restock the sauce cups.
scenario: 高峰前或库存不足时补充酱杯和杯盖。
importance: 后厨工作靠短指令推进，听懂流程能更快上手。
variants: Please restock the sauce cups.

vocabularyNotes.note: 这句话里的工作关键词。

moduleTitle: 后厨备菜、炸炉、洗碗和清洁
english: Clean the drink station.
scenario: 擦桌子、柜台、备餐台和食品接触表面。
importance: 后厨工作节奏快，听懂这些短句可以避免出餐延误、清洁错误和安全问题。
variants: Wipe down the drink station.
Clean the soda area.
recommendedResponses: Should I refill the lids too?

dialogue.english: Okay, I’ll wipe it down and check the lids.
dialogue.chinese: 好的，我会擦干净并检查杯盖。

vocabularyNotes.note: 顾客或员工取饮料、杯子、吸管和杯盖的区域。

moduleTitle: 后厨备菜、炸炉、洗碗和清洁
english: Weigh each piece.
scenario: 备菜、切配、称重、份量和食材标签。
importance: 后厨工作节奏快，听懂这些短句可以避免出餐延误、清洁错误和安全问题。
variants: Check the weight of each piece.
Put each piece on the scale.

dialogue.english: Okay. What weight should it be?

vocabularyNotes.note: 备菜时用秤确认每一块的重量符合标准。

moduleTitle: 后厨备菜、炸炉、洗碗和清洁
english: Mop the floor after closing.
scenario: 扫地、拖地、地面湿滑和关店地面清洁。
importance: 后厨工作节奏快，听懂这些短句可以避免出餐延误、清洁错误和安全问题。
variants: Mop after we close.
Mop the floor at closing.
recommendedResponses: I’ll put out the wet floor sign.

dialogue.english: Okay, I’ll sweep first and then mop.
dialogue.chinese: 好的，我会先扫地再拖地。

vocabularyNotes.note: 用拖把清洁地面，通常在扫地之后做。

moduleTitle: 后厨备菜、炸炉、洗碗和清洁
english: Write down anything the next shift needs to know.
chinese: 把下个班次需要知道的事情写下来。
scenario: 记录库存、设备、订单和未完成事项，方便下一班接手。
importance: 后厨工作靠短指令推进，听懂流程能更快上手。
variants: Write down anything the next shift needs to know.

dialogue.english: Write down anything the next shift needs to know.
dialogue.chinese: 把下个班次需要知道的事情写下来。

vocabularyNotes.note: 这句话里的工作关键词。
vocabularyNotes.example: Write down anything the next shift needs to know.

moduleTitle: 后厨备菜、炸炉、洗碗和清洁
english: The floor is still wet.
scenario: 扫地、拖地、地面湿滑和关店地面清洁。
importance: 后厨工作节奏快，听懂这些短句可以避免出餐延误、清洁错误和安全问题。
variants: The floor has not dried yet.
This area is still wet.
recommendedResponses: Put out the wet floor sign.
Let it dry before moving the mats back.

dialogue.english: Keep the wet floor sign out until it dries.
dialogue.chinese: 地面干之前把小心地滑标志继续放着。

vocabularyNotes.note: 提醒别人地面还没干，走路要小心。

moduleTitle: 后厨备菜、炸炉、洗碗和清洁
english: Put up the wet floor sign.
scenario: 扫地、拖地、地面湿滑和关店地面清洁。
importance: 后厨工作节奏快，听懂这些短句可以避免出餐延误、清洁错误和安全问题。
variants: Set out the wet floor sign.
Place the wet floor sign out.
recommendedResponses: Okay, I’ll put it out now.
I’ll leave it there until the floor dries.
Should I block this area too?

dialogue.english: Put up the wet floor sign.
Okay, I’ll put it by the wet area.
dialogue.chinese: 好的，我把它放在湿的地方旁边。

vocabularyNotes.note: 拖地或地面湿时放出来提醒别人。

moduleTitle: 后厨备菜、炸炉、洗碗和清洁
scenarioTitle: 备菜、洗碗、三槽水池、炸炉、拖地、关店清洁。
english: Greet every customer when they walk in.
chinese: 每位顾客进门时都要主动打招呼。
scenario: 培训前台员工及时回应进店顾客，即使暂时无法马上接单。
importance: 后厨工作靠短指令推进，听懂流程能更快上手。
variants: Greet every customer when they walk in.

dialogue.english: Greet every customer when they walk in.
dialogue.chinese: 每位顾客进门时都要主动打招呼。

vocabularyNotes.note: 这句话里的工作关键词。
vocabularyNotes.example: Greet every customer when they walk in.

moduleTitle: 后厨备菜、炸炉、洗碗和清洁
english: Repeat the order before you charge the customer.
chinese: 收款前先复述并确认订单。
scenario: 付款前复述主餐、配菜、饮料和特殊要求，减少错误。
importance: 后厨工作靠短指令推进，听懂流程能更快上手。
variants: Repeat the order before you charge the customer.

dialogue.english: Repeat the order before you charge the customer.
dialogue.chinese: 收款前先复述并确认订单。

vocabularyNotes.note: 这句话里的工作关键词。
vocabularyNotes.example: Repeat the order before you charge the customer.

moduleTitle: 后厨备菜、炸炉、洗碗和清洁
scenarioTitle: 备菜、洗碗、三槽水池、炸炉、拖地、关店清洁。
english: Use simpler words if the customer looks confused.
chinese: 顾客看起来没听懂时，用更简单的话说明。
scenario: 顾客英语有限或没有理解时，用短句、菜单指示和重复确认帮助沟通。
importance: 后厨工作靠短指令推进，听懂流程能更快上手。
variants: Use simpler words if the customer looks confused.

dialogue.english: Use simpler words if the customer looks confused.
dialogue.chinese: 顾客看起来没听懂时，用更简单的话说明。

vocabularyNotes.note: 这句话里的工作关键词。
vocabularyNotes.example: Use simpler words if the customer looks confused.

moduleTitle: 后厨备菜、炸炉、洗碗和清洁
scenarioTitle: 备菜、洗碗、三槽水池、炸炉、拖地、关店清洁。
english: Don't argue with the customer.
scenario: 遇到投诉或情绪激动的顾客时保持冷静，必要时请经理介入。
importance: 后厨工作靠短指令推进，听懂流程能更快上手。
variants: Don't argue with the customer.

vocabularyNotes.note: 这句话里的工作关键词。

moduleTitle: 后厨备菜、炸炉、洗碗和清洁
english: Ask for help if you're not sure.
chinese: 如果不确定，就请人帮忙。
scenario: 涉及订单、过敏、退款或设备时，不确定就先询问主管。
importance: 后厨工作靠短指令推进，听懂流程能更快上手。
variants: Ask for help if you're not sure.

dialogue.english: Ask for help if you're not sure.
dialogue.chinese: 如果不确定，就请人帮忙。

vocabularyNotes.note: 这句话里的工作关键词。
vocabularyNotes.example: Ask for help if you're not sure.

moduleTitle: 后厨备菜、炸炉、洗碗和清洁
scenarioTitle: 备菜、洗碗、三槽水池、炸炉、拖地、关店清洁。
english: Keep your voice calm and clear.
scenario: 高峰或投诉场景中，员工需要保持清晰、稳定的语气。
importance: 后厨工作靠短指令推进，听懂流程能更快上手。
variants: Keep your voice calm and clear.

dialogue.english: Keep your voice calm and clear.

vocabularyNotes.note: 这句话里的工作关键词。
vocabularyNotes.example: Keep your voice calm and clear.

moduleTitle: 后厨备菜、炸炉、洗碗和清洁
scenarioTitle: 备菜、洗碗、三槽水池、炸炉、拖地、关店清洁。
english: Check the receipt before handing out the food.
chinese: 把餐交出去前先核对小票。
scenario: 交餐前核对餐品、配菜、饮料和特殊要求。
importance: 后厨工作靠短指令推进，听懂流程能更快上手。
variants: Check the receipt before handing out the food.

dialogue.english: Check the receipt before handing out the food.
dialogue.chinese: 把餐交出去前先核对小票。

vocabularyNotes.note: 付款后的小票。

moduleTitle: 后厨备菜、炸炉、洗碗和清洁
english: If you make a mistake, tell me right away.
chinese: 如果出了错，马上告诉我。
scenario: 订单、现金、食品或设备出现错误时立即报告，便于尽快纠正。
importance: 后厨工作靠短指令推进，听懂流程能更快上手。
variants: If you make a mistake, tell me right away.
recommendedResponses: Got it. I’ll finish it before noon.
Which task should I do first?

dialogue.english: If you make a mistake, tell me right away.
dialogue.chinese: 如果出了错，马上告诉我。

dialogue.english: Got it. I’ll finish it before noon.
dialogue.chinese: 明白，我会在中午前完成。

vocabularyNotes.note: 这句话里的工作关键词。
vocabularyNotes.example: If you make a mistake, tell me right away.

moduleTitle: 后厨备菜、炸炉、洗碗和清洁
english: Good service means clear communication.
chinese: 好的服务离不开清楚的沟通。
scenario: 培训员工重视确认、解释和礼貌回应，而不仅是快速出餐。
importance: 后厨工作靠短指令推进，听懂流程能更快上手。
variants: Good service means clear communication.

dialogue.chinese: 好的服务离不开清楚的沟通。

vocabularyNotes.note: 这句话里的工作关键词。

moduleTitle: 后厨备菜、炸炉、洗碗和清洁
english: Stay focused during the rush.
scenario: 订单高峰时仍需按流程核对，不因忙乱跳过关键步骤。
importance: 后厨工作靠短指令推进，听懂流程能更快上手。
variants: Stay focused during the rush.

vocabularyNotes.note: 这句话里的工作关键词。

moduleTitle: 后厨备菜、炸炉、洗碗和清洁
scenarioTitle: 备菜、洗碗、三槽水池、炸炉、拖地、关店清洁。
english: We're running low on chicken.
scenario: 发现主原料库存不足时，及时通知主管或前台调整备货和销售。
importance: 后厨工作靠短指令推进，听懂流程能更快上手。
variants: We're running low on chicken.

vocabularyNotes.note: 这句话里的工作关键词。

moduleTitle: 后厨备菜、炸炉、洗碗和清洁
english: Bring more fries from the freezer.
chinese: 从冷冻库再拿一些薯条。
scenario: 炸台库存不足时，从指定冷冻区域补充未解冻产品。
importance: 后厨工作靠短指令推进，听懂流程能更快上手。
variants: Bring more fries from the freezer.

dialogue.english: Bring more fries from the freezer.
dialogue.chinese: 从冷冻库再拿一些薯条。

vocabularyNotes.note: 这句话里的工作关键词。
vocabularyNotes.example: Bring more fries from the freezer.

moduleTitle: 后厨备菜、炸炉、洗碗和清洁
english: Prep more sauce cups.
scenario: 备菜、切配、称重、份量和食材标签。
importance: 后厨工作节奏快，听懂这些短句可以避免出餐延误、清洁错误和安全问题。
variants: Get more sauce cups ready.
Prepare extra sauce cups.
recommendedResponses: Which sauce should I fill first?

dialogue.english: Okay. How many do we need?

vocabularyNotes.note: 装蘸酱或调味酱的小杯子。

moduleTitle: 后厨备菜、炸炉、洗碗和清洁
scenarioTitle: 备菜、洗碗、三槽水池、炸炉、拖地、关店清洁。
english: Check the expiration date before you use it.
scenario: 使用包装原料前核对有效期或使用期限。
importance: 这是安全相关表达，需要先确认再行动。
variants: Check the expiration date before you use it.

dialogue.english: Check the expiration date before you use it.

vocabularyNotes.note: 这句话里的工作关键词。
vocabularyNotes.example: Check the expiration date before you use it.

moduleTitle: 后厨备菜、炸炉、洗碗和清洁
scenarioTitle: 备菜、洗碗、三槽水池、炸炉、拖地、关店清洁。
english: Put the older product in front.
chinese: 把日期较早的产品放在前面。
scenario: 整理库存时把日期较早的产品放前面，减少过期浪费。
importance: 后厨工作靠短指令推进，听懂流程能更快上手。
variants: Put the older product in front.

dialogue.english: Put the older product in front.
dialogue.chinese: 把日期较早的产品放在前面。

vocabularyNotes.note: 这句话里的工作关键词。
vocabularyNotes.example: Put the older product in front.

moduleTitle: 后厨备菜、炸炉、洗碗和清洁
scenarioTitle: 备菜、洗碗、三槽水池、炸炉、拖地、关店清洁。
english: We're out of large cups.
scenario: 发现包装用品缺货时，及时通知前台和主管，避免未经顾客同意擅自替换。
importance: 后厨工作靠短指令推进，听懂流程能更快上手。
variants: We're out of large cups.

vocabularyNotes.note: 这句话里的工作关键词。

moduleTitle: 后厨备菜、炸炉、洗碗和清洁
english: Finish the closing checklist.
scenario: 关店清洁、补货、盘点和未完成工作交接。
importance: 后厨工作节奏快，听懂这些短句可以避免出餐延误、清洁错误和安全问题。
variants: Complete the closing checklist.
Go through the closing checklist.
recommendedResponses: Should I check the cooler too?
I’ll tell you if anything is missing.

dialogue.english: Okay, I’ll check each item and tell you when it is done.
dialogue.chinese: 好的，我会逐项检查，完成后告诉你。

dialogue.english: Good. Leave a note if anything is not finished.
dialogue.chinese: 好。如果有没完成的事，留个说明。

vocabularyNotes.note: 关店前要确认清洁、补货、设备和垃圾等项目。

moduleTitle: 后厨备菜、炸炉、洗碗和清洁
english: Count the inventory before we close.
scenario: 关店清洁、补货、盘点和未完成工作交接。
importance: 后厨工作节奏快，听懂这些短句可以避免出餐延误、清洁错误和安全问题。
variants: Count inventory before closing.
Check the stock before we close.
recommendedResponses: Which items should I count first?
I’ll write down what is low.

dialogue.english: Count the inventory before we close.
Okay, I’ll write down what we need.
dialogue.chinese: 好的，我会写下我们缺什么。

vocabularyNotes.note: 关店前检查食材或用品还剩多少。

moduleTitle: 后厨备菜、炸炉、洗碗和清洁
english: Check the oil temperature.
scenario: 炸炉、油温、炸制时间、设备状态和出餐进度。
importance: 后厨工作节奏快，听懂这些短句可以避免出餐延误、清洁错误和安全问题。
variants: Check how hot the oil is.
Look at the fryer temperature.
recommendedResponses: The oil is not hot enough yet.

dialogue.english: Okay. It is not hot enough yet.

vocabularyNotes.note: 炸炉里的油当前有多热，影响炸制时间和出餐质量。

moduleTitle: 后厨备菜、炸炉、洗碗和清洁
scenarioTitle: 备菜、洗碗、三槽水池、炸炉、拖地、关店清洁。
english: Don't open a new case yet.
scenario: 避免同时打开多箱造成混乱、浪费或日期管理问题。
importance: 后厨工作靠短指令推进，听懂流程能更快上手。
variants: Don't open a new case yet.

dialogue.english: Don't open a new case yet.

vocabularyNotes.note: 这句话里的工作关键词。
vocabularyNotes.example: Don't open a new case yet.

moduleTitle: 后厨备菜、炸炉、洗碗和清洁
scenarioTitle: 备菜、洗碗、三槽水池、炸炉、拖地、关店清洁。
english: Does this contain peanuts?
scenario: 顾客询问过敏原时，员工必须核对可靠资料，不能凭记忆保证。
importance: 这是安全相关表达，需要先确认再行动。
variants: Does this contain peanuts, please?

vocabularyNotes.note: 这句话里的工作关键词。

moduleTitle: 后厨备菜、炸炉、洗碗和清洁
scenarioTitle: 备菜、洗碗、三槽水池、炸炉、拖地、关店清洁。
english: Please tell us if you have any food allergies.
chinese: 如果您有食物过敏，请告诉我们。
scenario: 餐厅需要了解过敏信息时，礼貌请顾客提前说明。
importance: 这是安全相关表达，需要先确认再行动。
variants: Can you tell us if you have any food allergies?
Could you please tell us if you have any food allergies?

dialogue.english: Please tell us if you have any food allergies.
dialogue.chinese: 如果您有食物过敏，请告诉我们。

vocabularyNotes.note: 这句话里的工作关键词。
vocabularyNotes.example: Please tell us if you have any food allergies.

moduleTitle: 后厨备菜、炸炉、洗碗和清洁
scenarioTitle: 备菜、洗碗、三槽水池、炸炉、拖地、关店清洁。
english: This item may contain dairy.
chinese: 这款餐品可能含有乳制品。
scenario: 信息尚未完全确认时，应明确是“可能含有”并继续核实，不能猜测。
importance: 这是安全相关表达，需要先确认再行动。
variants: This one item may contain dairy.
This item item may contain dairy.

dialogue.chinese: 这款餐品可能含有乳制品。

vocabularyNotes.note: 这句话里的工作关键词。

moduleTitle: 后厨备菜、炸炉、洗碗和清洁
english: How long on the tenders?
scenario: 炸炉、油温、炸制时间、设备状态和出餐进度。
importance: 后厨工作节奏快，听懂这些短句可以避免出餐延误、清洁错误和安全问题。
variants: How much longer for the tenders?
When will the tenders be ready?

vocabularyNotes.note: 出餐时询问某个餐品还需要多久。

moduleTitle: 后厨备菜、炸炉、洗碗和清洁
english: Use fresh gloves for this order.
chinese: 这份订单要换一副新手套。
scenario: 处理特殊饮食或过敏订单时，更换手套只是控制措施之一，还需按门店过敏流程操作。
importance: 这是安全相关表达，需要先确认再行动。
variants: Use fresh gloves for this order.

dialogue.english: Use fresh gloves for this order.
dialogue.chinese: 这份订单要换一副新手套。

vocabularyNotes.note: 食品操作时戴的手套。

moduleTitle: 后厨备菜、炸炉、洗碗和清洁
scenarioTitle: 备菜、洗碗、三槽水池、炸炉、拖地、关店清洁。
english: Keep raw chicken away from ready-to-eat food.
chinese: 生鸡肉要和即食食品分开。
scenario: 生鸡肉必须与熟食、蔬菜和即食食品分区存放和处理。
importance: 这是安全相关表达，需要先确认再行动。
variants: Keep raw chicken away from ready-to-eat food.

dialogue.english: Keep raw chicken away from ready-to-eat food.
dialogue.chinese: 生鸡肉要和即食食品分开。

vocabularyNotes.note: 这句话里的工作关键词。
vocabularyNotes.example: Keep raw chicken away from ready-to-eat food.

moduleTitle: 后厨备菜、炸炉、洗碗和清洁
english: Wash your hands before returning to the line.
scenario: 员工离开岗位、处理垃圾或接触污染物后，按规定洗手；如接下来需要戴手套处理食品，应在洗手后换上干净的新手套。
importance: 这是安全相关表达，需要先确认再行动。
variants: Wash your hands before returning to the line.

dialogue.english: Wash your hands before returning to the line.

vocabularyNotes.note: 这句话里的工作关键词。
vocabularyNotes.example: Wash your hands before returning to the line.

moduleTitle: 后厨备菜、炸炉、洗碗和清洁
english: Do not serve food that fell on the floor.
chinese: 掉到地上的食物不能提供给顾客。
scenario: 扫地、拖地、地面湿滑和关店地面清洁。
importance: 后厨工作节奏快，听懂这些短句可以避免出餐延误、清洁错误和安全问题。
variants: Do not serve food from the floor.
Throw away food that fell on the floor.
recommendedResponses: Should I start a new one?

dialogue.english: Do not serve food that fell on the floor.
dialogue.chinese: 掉到地上的食物不能提供给顾客。

dialogue.english: Okay, I’ll throw it away and remake it.
dialogue.chinese: 好的，我会丢掉并重新做。

vocabularyNotes.note: 食物掉到地上后不能再出餐。
vocabularyNotes.example: The bread fell on the floor.

moduleTitle: 后厨备菜、炸炉、洗碗和清洁
english: Check the food temperature before serving it.
scenario: 按门店食品安全标准使用清洁温度计检查关键食品温度。具体数值应以当地法规和门店标准为准。
importance: 这是安全相关表达，需要先确认再行动。
variants: Check the food temperature before serving it.

dialogue.english: Check the food temperature before serving it.

vocabularyNotes.note: 这句话里的工作关键词。
vocabularyNotes.example: Check the food temperature before serving it.

moduleTitle: 后厨备菜、炸炉、洗碗和清洁
scenarioTitle: 备菜、洗碗、三槽水池、炸炉、拖地、关店清洁。
english: When in doubt, throw it out.
chinese: 不确定食品是否安全时，就把它丢掉。
scenario: 食品时间、温度、污染或保存状态不确定时，不要冒险提供给顾客。
importance: 这是安全相关表达，需要先确认再行动。
variants: When in doubt, throw it out.

dialogue.english: When in doubt, throw it out.
dialogue.chinese: 不确定食品是否安全时，就把它丢掉。

vocabularyNotes.note: 这句话里的工作关键词。
vocabularyNotes.example: When in doubt, throw it out.

moduleTitle: 后厨备菜、炸炉、洗碗和清洁
scenarioTitle: 备菜、洗碗、三槽水池、炸炉、拖地、关店清洁。
english: We're out of chicken breasts. Please mark the item as sold out.
chinese: 鸡胸肉卖完了，请把这个餐品标记为售罄。
scenario: 厨房确认某种原料已经用完后，及时通知前台或线上系统停止销售。“86”是部分北美餐厅会使用的行话，应作为可能听到的表达，不作为初学者唯一主句。
importance: 后厨工作靠短指令推进，听懂流程能更快上手。
variants: We're out of chicken breasts. Please mark the item as sold out.

dialogue.english: We're out of chicken breasts. Please mark the item as sold out.
dialogue.chinese: 鸡胸肉卖完了，请把这个餐品标记为售罄。

vocabularyNotes.note: 这句话里的工作关键词。
vocabularyNotes.example: We're out of chicken breasts. Please mark the item as sold out.

moduleTitle: 后厨备菜、炸炉、洗碗和清洁
english: We're backed up in the kitchen. We need help with the orders.
chinese: 厨房订单积压了，我们需要支援。
scenario: 高峰期厨房订单积压时，请求主管调配人员，并让前台如实更新等待时间。
importance: 后厨工作靠短指令推进，听懂流程能更快上手。
variants: We're backed up in the kitchen. We need help with the orders.

dialogue.english: We're backed up in the kitchen. We need help with the orders.
dialogue.chinese: 厨房订单积压了，我们需要支援。

vocabularyNotes.note: 这句话里的工作关键词。
vocabularyNotes.example: We're backed up in the kitchen. We need help with the orders.

moduleTitle: 后厨备菜、炸炉、洗碗和清洁
english: Keep cleaning chemicals away from food and prep areas.
chinese: 清洁化学品要远离食品和备餐区域。
scenario: 备菜、切配、称重、份量和食材标签。
importance: 后厨工作节奏快，听懂这些短句可以避免出餐延误、清洁错误和安全问题。
variants: Store chemicals away from food.
Do not keep chemicals near prep areas.
recommendedResponses: I’ll keep chemicals off the prep table.

dialogue.english: Keep cleaning chemicals away from food and prep areas.
dialogue.chinese: 清洁化学品要远离食品和备餐区域。

dialogue.english: Okay, I’ll store them in the chemical area.
dialogue.chinese: 好的，我会放到化学品存放区。

vocabularyNotes.note: 清洁剂、消毒剂等，不能放在食物或备餐台附近。

moduleTitle: 后厨备菜、炸炉、洗碗和清洁
english: Do not thaw meat on the counter. Follow the procedure.
chinese: 不要把肉放在台面上解冻。按流程操作。
scenario: 擦桌子、柜台、备餐台和食品接触表面。
importance: 后厨工作节奏快，听懂这些短句可以避免出餐延误、清洁错误和安全问题。
variants: Do not thaw meat on the counter.
Use the approved thawing procedure.
recommendedResponses: Okay, I won’t thaw it there.

dialogue.english: Do not thaw meat on the counter. Follow the procedure.
dialogue.chinese: 不要把肉放在台面上解冻。按流程操作。

dialogue.english: Okay. Where should I thaw it?
dialogue.chinese: 好的。我应该在哪里解冻？

dialogue.english: Use the cooler or the approved method.
dialogue.chinese: 用冷藏柜或批准的方法。

vocabularyNotes.note: 把冷冻肉恢复到可处理状态，不能随便放在台面上。

moduleTitle: 后厨备菜、炸炉、洗碗和清洁
english: Label and date the prep container before putting it away.
chinese: 把备料盒收起来之前，要贴标签并写上日期。
scenario: 备菜、切配、称重、份量和食材标签。
importance: 后厨工作节奏快，听懂这些短句可以避免出餐延误、清洁错误和安全问题。
variants: Date and label the prep container first.
Put the label and date on the container.
recommendedResponses: Okay, I’ll label and date it.

dialogue.english: Label and date the prep container before putting it away.
dialogue.chinese: 把备料盒收起来之前，要贴标签并写上日期。

dialogue.english: Okay, I’ll write today’s date on it.
dialogue.chinese: 好的，我会写上今天的日期。

vocabularyNotes.note: 备料容器收起来前写清内容和日期。

moduleTitle: 后厨备菜、炸炉、洗碗和清洁
english: Check and record the holding temperature.
chinese: 检查并记录食品的保温或冷藏温度。
scenario: 扫地、拖地、地面湿滑和关店地面清洁。
importance: 后厨工作节奏快，听懂这些短句可以避免出餐延误、清洁错误和安全问题。
variants: Write down the holding temperature.
Check and record the food temperature.

dialogue.english: Check and record the holding temperature.
dialogue.chinese: 检查并记录食品的保温或冷藏温度。

dialogue.english: Okay. What temperature should it be?

vocabularyNotes.note: 食品存放时必须保持的安全温度。

moduleTitle: 后厨备菜、炸炉、洗碗和清洁
english: Follow the fryer safety procedure when filtering or changing the oil.
chinese: 过滤或更换炸油时，要按照炸炉安全流程操作。
scenario: 洗碗机、洗洁精、餐具清洗和摆放。
importance: 这是安全相关表达，需要先确认再行动。
variants: Follow the fryer safety procedure when filtering or changing the oil.

dialogue.english: Follow the fryer safety procedure when filtering or changing the oil.
dialogue.chinese: 过滤或更换炸油时，要按照炸炉安全流程操作。

vocabularyNotes.note: 这句话里的工作关键词。
vocabularyNotes.example: Follow the fryer safety procedure when filtering or changing the oil.

moduleTitle: 后厨备菜、炸炉、洗碗和清洁
english: The order is missing fries. Can you make them right away?
chinese: 这份订单少了薯条，可以马上补做吗？
scenario: 发现堂食、外带或外卖订单漏装餐品时，前台或出餐人员通知厨房尽快补做。“on the fly”可作为厨房行话的听力补充。
importance: 后厨工作靠短指令推进，听懂流程能更快上手。
variants: The order is missing fries. Can you make them right away, please?

dialogue.english: The order is missing fries. Can you make them right away?
dialogue.chinese: 这份订单少了薯条，可以马上补做吗？

vocabularyNotes.note: 这句话里的工作关键词。
vocabularyNotes.example: The order is missing fries. Can you make them right away?

moduleTitle: 后厨备菜、炸炉、洗碗和清洁
english: We are waiting on the wings.
scenario: 扫地、拖地、地面湿滑和关店地面清洁。
importance: 后厨工作节奏快，听懂这些短句可以避免出餐延误、清洁错误和安全问题。
variants: The wings are not ready yet.
The order is waiting on wings.
recommendedResponses: How much longer on the wings?
Let me know when they are ready.

dialogue.english: We are waiting on the wings.

vocabularyNotes.note: 出餐时表示整份订单还差某一样餐品。

moduleTitle: 后厨备菜、炸炉、洗碗和清洁
english: The oil is too hot.
scenario: 炸炉、油温、炸制时间、设备状态和出餐进度。
importance: 后厨工作节奏快，听懂这些短句可以避免出餐延误、清洁错误和安全问题。
variants: The fryer oil is too hot.
The oil temperature is too high.

dialogue.english: Turn it down and wait a minute.

vocabularyNotes.note: 油温过高可能把食物炸焦或造成危险。

moduleTitle: 后厨备菜、炸炉、洗碗和清洁
english: The oil is not hot enough.

vocabularyNotes.note: 油温还没达到可以炸食物的温度。
vocabularyNotes.example: The oven is not hot enough.

moduleTitle: 后厨备菜、炸炉、洗碗和清洁

moduleTitle: 后厨备菜、炸炉、洗碗和清洁
english: The dishwasher is not draining.
scenario: 洗碗机、洗洁精、餐具清洗和摆放。
importance: 后厨工作节奏快，听懂这些短句可以避免出餐延误、清洁错误和安全问题。

vocabularyNotes.note: 机器里的水排不出去。

moduleTitle: 后厨备菜、炸炉、洗碗和清洁
english: The dishwasher is not getting hot enough.
scenario: 洗碗机、洗洁精、餐具清洗和摆放。

recommendedResponses: Do not use those dishes yet.

dialogue.english: The dishwasher is not getting hot enough.
Do not use those dishes yet. I’ll check the temperature.
dialogue.chinese: 先不要用那些餐具。我来检查温度。

vocabularyNotes.note: enough 表示达到需要的程度。

moduleTitle: 后厨备菜、炸炉、洗碗和清洁
english: Clean the dishwasher filter.
scenario: 洗碗机、洗洁精、餐具清洗和摆放。
importance: 后厨工作节奏快，听懂这些短句可以避免出餐延误、清洁错误和安全问题。
variants: Clean the filter in the dishwasher.

recommendedResponses: Okay, I will clean the filter.
Can you show me how to remove it?
Should I turn it off first?

dialogue.english: Okay. Should I turn it off first?

vocabularyNotes.note: 用来挡住食物残渣或脏东西的部件。

moduleTitle: 后厨备菜、炸炉、洗碗和清洁
english: Don’t mix chemicals.
scenario: 洗碗机、洗洁精、餐具清洗和摆放。

I will ask before using chemicals.

dialogue.english: Okay, I will keep them separate and ask first.
dialogue.chinese: 好的，我会分开放，有问题先问。

vocabularyNotes.note: 清洁剂混合可能产生危险气体，听到后要停止并询问。

moduleTitle: 后厨备菜、炸炉、洗碗和清洁
english: Wipe the table.

recommendedResponses: Okay, I will wipe it now.

dialogue.english: Okay, I’ll use a clean cloth.

moduleTitle: 后厨备菜、炸炉、洗碗和清洁
english: Clean the table.
scenario: 擦桌子、柜台、备餐台和食品接触表面。
importance: 后厨工作节奏快，听懂这些短句可以避免出餐延误、清洁错误和安全问题。
variants: Clean this table.
Make sure the table is clean.
recommendedResponses: I will use a clean cloth.

dialogue.english: Okay. Should I sanitize it after cleaning?

moduleTitle: 后厨备菜、炸炉、洗碗和清洁
english: Spray the cleaner on the cloth.
scenario: 擦桌子、柜台、备餐台和食品接触表面。
importance: 后厨工作节奏快，听懂这些短句可以避免出餐延误、清洁错误和安全问题。
variants: Spray the cloth, not the food area.
Put cleaner on the cloth first.
recommendedResponses: Okay, I will spray the cloth.
I will not spray near food.

dialogue.english: Spray the cleaner on the cloth.
Okay, I will not spray near food.
dialogue.chinese: 好的，我不会在食物旁边喷。

vocabularyNotes.note: 不是直接喷到食物或桌面附近。

moduleTitle: 后厨备菜、炸炉、洗碗和清洁
english: Don’t spray near the food.
chinese: 不要在食物旁边喷清洁剂。
scenario: 洗碗机、洗洁精、餐具清洗和摆放。
importance: 这是安全相关表达，需要先确认再行动。

moduleTitle: 后厨备菜、炸炉、洗碗和清洁
english: Use the table cleaner.
scenario: 擦桌子、柜台、备餐台和食品接触表面。
importance: 后厨工作节奏快，听懂这些短句可以避免出餐延误、清洁错误和安全问题。
variants: Use the cleaner for tables.
Use the table cleaning spray.
recommendedResponses: Okay, I will use the table cleaner.

dialogue.english: Okay. Should I sanitize after cleaning?

vocabularyNotes.note: 用于桌面，不要和洗碗剂或食品消毒剂混用。

moduleTitle: 后厨备菜、炸炉、洗碗和清洁
english: Sanitize the table after cleaning it.
scenario: 清洗、冲洗、消毒和自然晾干的三槽水池流程。
importance: 后厨工作节奏快，听懂这些短句可以避免出餐延误、清洁错误和安全问题。
variants: Clean it first, then sanitize it.

dialogue.english: Sanitize the table after cleaning it.
Right. Let it air-dry after sanitizing.
dialogue.chinese: 对。消毒后让它自然晾干。

vocabularyNotes.note: 餐厅里常用于食品接触表面或餐具消毒。
